title: Rural Agriculture Intern
skills_required: basic farming, crop knowledge, rural work
description: Work directly with rural farmers to support crop planning and harvest activities. No prior experience needed, training will be provided on the job.

title: Data Entry Intern
skills_required: basic computer, typing, ms office
description: Enter and manage government data records using basic computer software. Candidates with basic typing skills and computer knowledge are preferred.

title: Health Worker Intern
skills_required: basic health knowledge, communication, rural outreach
description: Support local health workers in conducting health camps and awareness drives in rural villages. No medical degree required, just willingness to serve communities.

title: Digital Literacy Trainer Intern
skills_required: computer, teaching, communication, basic internet
description: Teach basic computer and internet skills to rural citizens at Common Service Centres. Friendly communication skills and patience are the main requirements.

title: Soil Testing Assistant Intern
skills_required: soil testing, agriculture, lab work, basic science
description: Assist scientists in collecting soil samples and running basic tests to help farmers understand their soil quality. Diploma in agriculture or science preferred.

title: Retail Store Management Intern
skills_required: stock management, communication, retail, counting
description: Help manage inventory and assist customers at government retail outlets. No special skills required, on the job training is provided from day one.

title: Primary School Teaching Intern
skills_required: teaching, communication, children, basic english, hindi
description: Support primary school teachers in classrooms and help children with reading and writing activities. Ideal for candidates who enjoy working with young children.

title: Banking Correspondent Intern
skills_required: banking, finance, communication, basic math, rural outreach
description: Assist bank correspondents in providing basic banking services to rural citizens who cannot visit branches. Candidates should be comfortable travelling to nearby villages.

title: IT Support Intern
skills_required: hardware, networking, computer repair, troubleshooting
description: Provide technical support and basic maintenance for computers and networks at government offices. Diploma in computer science or IT is preferred for this role.

title: Warehouse Logistics Intern
skills_required: physical work, logistics, loading, stock counting, teamwork
description: Assist in managing grain storage and logistics operations at government warehouses. No educational specialisation required, just physical fitness and a willingness to work hard.

title: Community Health Educator Intern
skills_required: health awareness, communication, rural, women health, community
description: Conduct health education sessions in villages focusing on maternal health, nutrition, and sanitation. Candidates from rural backgrounds are strongly encouraged to apply.

title: Finance Accounts Intern
skills_required: accounting, tally, finance, excel, data entry
description: Support the accounts team with data entry, report preparation, and basic financial analysis tasks. Commerce graduates with knowledge of Tally or Excel are preferred.

title: Irrigation Field Assistant Intern
skills_required: irrigation, water, field work, agriculture, rural
description: Assist engineers in monitoring irrigation canals and water distribution systems in rural areas. Class 10 pass candidates from farming backgrounds are most suitable.

title: E-Commerce Packaging Intern
skills_required: packaging, sorting, delivery, physical work, teamwork
description: Help sort and package parcels at India Post logistics centres and assist with last mile delivery operations. No special skills needed, just punctuality and teamwork.

title: Software Testing Intern
skills_required: software testing, computer, bug tracking, basic coding, excel
description: Test government software applications and document bugs and issues found during testing cycles. IT or computer science graduates with basic programming knowledge preferred.

title: Construction Site Intern
skills_required: civil engineering, construction, site work, measurements, teamwork
description: Support site engineers during construction of government buildings and infrastructure projects. Civil engineering diploma holders are preferred for this hands-on role.

title: Mid Day Meal Coordinator Intern
skills_required: food, nutrition, school, coordination, record keeping
description: Coordinate mid day meal distribution at government schools and maintain daily attendance and meal records. Candidates with interest in child nutrition and education are preferred.

title: Manufacturing Quality Intern
skills_required: quality check, manufacturing, measurements, tools, technical
description: Inspect manufactured components for quality and assist senior engineers in maintaining production standards. Diploma in mechanical or electrical engineering is required.

title: Rural BPO Trainee Intern
skills_required: communication, computer, typing, customer service, english
description: Handle basic customer queries and data entry tasks at a rural BPO centre with full training provided. Class 12 pass candidates with basic English communication skills are welcome.

title: Anganwadi Support Intern
company: Ministry of Women and Child Development
skills_required: childcare, nutrition, rural, women, community, basic health
description: Support Anganwadi workers in conducting nutrition programmes and early childhood activities in rural communities. Class 10 pass women candidates from rural areas are strongly preferred.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
skills_required: developer, html, css, javascript, frontend, react, web development, coding
description: Build and maintain web application interfaces using React and JavaScript under senior developer guidance. Computer science graduates with frontend developer skills and knowledge of HTML CSS JavaScript are preferred.

title: Java Backend Developer Intern
skills_required: java, backend, developer, spring boot, sql, coding, object oriented programming
description: Develop and test backend services using Java and Spring Boot for enterprise level applications. Candidates with strong Java programming and basic SQL knowledge are highly preferred.

title: UI UX Design Intern
skills_required: ui ux, design, figma, user interface, wireframe, prototyping, adobe xd, creative
description: Design user interface wireframes and prototypes for mobile and web applications using Figma and Adobe XD. Candidates with a portfolio of UI UX design work and creative skills are strongly preferred.

title: C++ Systems Programming Intern
skills_required: c++, systems programming, embedded, coding, developer, algorithms, data structures
description: Work on embedded systems and low level software projects using C++ programming language under senior engineers. Engineering graduates with strong C++ coding and algorithms knowledge are required.

title: Digital Marketing Intern
skills_required: digital marketing, social media, seo, content creation, google ads, instagram, facebook
description: Manage social media handles, run digital marketing campaigns, and create SEO optimised content for tourism promotion. Candidates with digital marketing experience and social media skills are preferred.

title: Video Editing Intern
skills_required: video editing, premiere pro, after effects, youtube, content creation, storytelling
description: Edit educational and government awareness videos using Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects for broadcast and YouTube. Candidates with a video editing portfolio and knowledge of storytelling are preferred.

title: Python Developer Intern
skills_required: python, developer, flask, django, coding, automation, scripting, data
description: Develop automation scripts and web services using Python Flask and Django for government digital infrastructure. Computer science graduates with Python developer skills and scripting experience are preferred.

title: Mobile App Developer Intern
skills_required: developer, android, flutter, react native, mobile app, kotlin, java, coding
description: Build and test Android mobile applications using Flutter and Kotlin for government citizen service apps. Candidates with mobile app developer skills and experience in Flutter or Android are preferred.

title: Graphic Design Intern
skills_required: graphic design, photoshop, illustrator, canva, creative, poster design, visual
description: Create visual communication materials including posters infographics and banners for government campaigns using Photoshop and Illustrator. Candidates with a graphic design portfolio and Canva or Adobe skills are welcome.

title: Social Media Content Intern
skills_required: social media, content creation, digital marketing, writing, instagram, twitter, canva
description: Create and schedule engaging social media content across Instagram Twitter and LinkedIn for government policy communication. Candidates with content creation and digital marketing writing skills are preferred.

title: Cybersecurity Intern
skills_required: cybersecurity, networking, ethical hacking, linux, developer, python, security
description: Assist cybersecurity analysts in monitoring threats and conducting vulnerability assessments for government networks. IT graduates with networking cybersecurity and Linux skills are strongly preferred.

title: Data Science Intern
skills_required: data science, python, machine learning, developer, excel, statistics, pandas, numpy
description: Analyse satellite data and assist in building machine learning models for space research applications. Engineering or computer science graduates with Python data science and ML skills are required.

title: SEO and Content Writing Intern
skills_required: seo, content writing, digital marketing, blogging, google analytics, copywriting
description: Write SEO optimised articles and web content for government digital awareness portals and campaigns. Graduates with strong English writing SEO and digital marketing content skills are preferred.

title: After Effects Motion Graphics Intern
skills_required: video editing, after effects, motion graphics, animation, premiere pro, creative
description: Create motion graphics and animated explainer videos using After Effects for documentary and public communication projects. Candidates with video editing and After Effects animation skills are preferred.

title: UI Developer Intern
skills_required: ui ux, developer, html, css, javascript, figma, react, frontend, web design
description: Design and implement responsive user interfaces using React and Figma prototypes for enterprise web applications. Candidates with both UI UX design and frontend developer skills are highly preferred.

title: Digital Marketing Analytics Intern
skills_required: digital marketing, google analytics, seo, excel, data, social media, ads
description: Analyse campaign performance data and generate insights to improve digital marketing and advertising efficiency. Commerce or MBA graduates with Google Analytics digital marketing and Excel skills are preferred.

title: Java Full Stack Intern
skills_required: java, developer, full stack, spring boot, react, sql, coding, backend, frontend
description: Build full stack web applications using Java Spring Boot for backend and React for frontend under senior developer mentorship. IT graduates with Java full stack developer coding skills are preferred.

title: YouTube Video Production Intern
skills_required: video editing, youtube, content creation, camera, storytelling, premiere pro, social media
description: Shoot and edit educational and awareness videos for the official government YouTube channels with full creative support. Class 12 pass candidates with video editing YouTube content creation skills are welcome.

title: C++ Game Logic Developer Intern
skills_required: c++, developer, game development, algorithms, data structures, coding, opengl
description: Develop game logic and simulation modules using C++ and OpenGL for educational simulation software projects. Engineering graduates with strong C++ developer and algorithms coding skills are preferred.

title: Instagram Growth and Branding Intern
skills_required: digital marketing, instagram, branding, content creation, canva, social media, reels
description: Grow and manage the Make in India Instagram presence through reels stories and branded content creation. Candidates with Instagram digital marketing branding and Canva content creation skills are preferred.
